reference: Hello, I have a son who is ten years old. He had a sharp pain in his lower back followed by dizziness and a cold sweat. He had a bluish color and, as this happened, he also experienced a loss of bladder control. This has never happened before and I am very concerned.
text: Hello. I have a son who is 10 years old. He had a sharp pain in his lower back, followed by dizziness and a cold sweat. He had a bluish color, and as this happened, he also experienced a loss of bladder control. This has never happened before, and I am very concerned.
